title: Front Office Manager - Air India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Air India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Air India in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Air India:
Air India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India!
